message:
fix(vfs): correct WAL checksum accumulator order in unix native-endian path

Fix the same WAL checksum dependency-order bug in the unix VFS
native-endian 8-byte chunk variant that was fixed in checksum.rs in
the prior commit. The correct SQLite algorithm requires sequential
accumulation (s1 += w1; s2 += s1; s1 += w2; s2 += s1) rather than
the collapsed parallel form that produced incorrect checksums.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
